title: Cursor Video
text: Cursor Video Specify whether the field is highlighted when it is active. Not valid in character mode. Value Description True The active field is highlighted. False The active field is not highlighted and the NAV field layout code is applied. Description The attributes used to highlight the field are defined by the $ACTIVE_FIELD assignment setting. For example, to highlight the active field with the system highlight color, use the HLT attribute: $ACTIVE_FIELD = HLT Copy Note: If $ACTIVE_FIELD is not present in the assignment file, the Cursor Video field layout property has no effect, and the field is not highlighted when it is active. Applies to Modeled Field Layout Related Links $ACTIVE_FIELD Set the video attributes for the active field. Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
